policy.sourceHandling: Use Xiaohongshu references for observation only. Do not publish copied images in the web app.
policy.confirmationGate: New inspiration remains pending until the owner confirms it should change generation rules.

creators.name: 柏恩花室
creators.notes: Natural floral arrangements with tropical greenery, wind-shaped branches, and small bright color accents.

creators.name: 早春的树EarlySpring
creators.notes: Natural bouquet structures, airy branches, hand-tied shapes, and blind-box flower combinations.

creators.name: Césped
creators.notes: Light, atmospheric arrangements with soft color fields and small-scale floral rhythm.

creators.name: 大兜花园DorBeetleGarden
creators.notes: Garden-like wildness, starry small flowers, and loose natural edges.

creators.name: Dreamseeker寻梦
creators.notes: Dreamlike bouquet styling with misty points, light color transitions, and spatial softness.

entries.title: Initial DailyFlora aesthetic anchor
colorNotes: Dark stage backgrounds make pale flowers and star points glow.
Green, lemon yellow, violet, moon white, coral, and sky blue can rotate as daily themes.
spatialNotes: Bouquets should be volumetric, with stems radiating from a lower grip into a rounded but irregular crown.
Back and side views need real branches, small flowers, and leaf clusters instead of a flat billboard.
materialNotes: Use many small blooms, berries, twig tips, grasses, and floating pollen-like dots.
parameterSuggestions: Favor medium and small flower instances.
Use outer halo lines and point particles for starry edges.
Keep a hand-tied floating base instead of a vase for v1.

entries.title: 不是惊喜，是“你懂我”的那种安心💐
colorNotes: composition reads as carefully matched rather than high-contrast novelty
spatialNotes: favor a balanced bouquet body with recognizable focal blooms and supporting texture
materialNotes: no explicit material detail available from public text; keep source link pending for visual review
parameterSuggestions: keep focal bloom count moderate, then use small particles to echo material matching

inboxEvidence.caption:
收到这束花真的太开心了所以决定分享一下学校附近挖到的这家宝藏花店！[派对R][派对R][派对R][派对R][派对R]
拿图定制还原度也是高到离谱💯
本来只是抱着试试看的心态，
给老板看了张网图：我想要这种花🌷
结果拿到手那一刻我惊了——
🎨颜色、花型、搭配，几乎一毛一样！
老板审美也太在线了吧👏
而且价格对学生党超友好！
美女老板人也超nice，别问去就对了💗
#生活充满惊喜[话题]# #总有人用心总有人浪漫[话题]# #低预算高颜值[话题]# #罗江[话题]# #罗江花店[话题]# #宝藏花店[话题]# #分享[话题]#

implementedIn.summary: Added a warm bright field bouquet theme with stronger branch, leaf, and outer-line structure.

entries.title: 蝉鸣铺满河床🍃🌠
colorNotes: warm bright palette signal; bias toward sunlit yellow, peach, and fresh green accents
spatialNotes: natural bouquet cue; keep the silhouette airy instead of a compact dome
materialNotes: increase branch, leaf, grass, and small filler rhythm around the outer shell
parameterSuggestions: add a warm daylight palette variant with higher yellow/peach weight and softer green support
raise outer branch/grass count and vary stem heights for a field-like structure

pendingRecommendations.title: Lychee Garden｜捏一个彩虹🌈
colorNotes: rainbow palette signal; use multiple clear hues but keep green, pale flowers, and air gaps as buffers
lychee garden cue; keep pink-red sweetness balanced with fresh green and pale highlights
spatialNotes: multi-color bouquet cue; distribute color by material role instead of making one noisy color cloud
natural bouquet cue; keep the silhouette airy instead of a compact dome
materialNotes: use small blooms, fruit points, and line flowers to carry saturated colors at different scales
fruit-garden cue; consider small rounded fruit or pearl accents only when attached to stems
increase branch, leaf, grass, and small filler rhythm around the outer shell
parameterSuggestions: increase controlled multi-hue variation while preserving readable flower roles and outer air
treat fruit dots as branch-owned accents, not loose random particles
raise outer branch/grass count and vary stem heights for a field-like structure
